All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Animaciones
Visual effects and animations for the UI components.
controller
Main controller class for the Fast Writing Game logic.
IPalabras
Interface for word management logic.
ITemporizador
Interface for timer management logic.
Main
Entry point of the application.
Palabras
Model class that manages the dictionary of words for the game.
PerdistesController
Controller for the Game Over screen.
Temporizador
Handles the countdown timer logic for the gameplay.
